sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Persistent Asset Partners Ltd Decreases Position in Bank of America Corporation $BAC
feed.summary: Persistent Asset Partners Ltd significantly reduced its stake in Bank of America Corporation (NYSE:BAC) by 51.6% during the third quarter, selling 9,687 shares and now owning 9,091 shares valued at $469,000. Despite this reduction, several other institutional investors increased their holdings, while Bank of America announced a quarterly dividend of $0.28 per share and analysts adjusted price targets, leading to an average "Moderate Buy" rating for the stock. The article also highlights recent positive and negative news impacting BAC, including a new rewards program, potential regulatory easing, and concerns about private-credit commitments and Warren Buffett's trimmed position.

feed.title: Persistent Asset Partners Ltd Makes New $4.17 Million Investment in UnitedHealth Group Incorporated $UNH
feed.summary: Persistent Asset Partners Ltd has made a significant new investment of $4.17 million in UnitedHealth Group Incorporated, purchasing 12,063 shares. This stake represents about 2.9% of the firm's investment portfolio, making it their third-largest holding. The article also details other institutional investors' recent activities in UnitedHealth Group and provides an overview of the company's stock performance, financial metrics, and analyst ratings.

feed.title: Labcorp Holdings Inc. $LH Shares Bought by Persistent Asset Partners Ltd
feed.summary: Persistent Asset Partners Ltd increased its stake in Labcorp Holdings Inc. (NYSE:LH) by 90% in the third quarter, making Labcorp its 11th largest holding. Several other institutional investors also adjusted their positions in the medical research company. Labcorp recently announced a quarterly dividend and reported Q4 earnings that topped analyst estimates, alongside insider share sales by EVP Jonathan C. Meltzer and CEO Adam H. Schechter.

feed.title: EPAM Systems, Inc. (NYSE:EPAM) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: EPAM Systems, Inc. (NYSE: EPAM) announced its Q4 and full-year 2025 earnings, reporting a non-GAAP EPS of $3.26 against expectations of $3.16. The company highlighted strong double-digit revenue growth, driven by significant momentum in AI-native services, which exceeded $105 million in Q4 and are projected to reach over $600 million in 2026. EPAM also provided a positive outlook for 2026, anticipating continued growth despite some client-specific headwinds and a shift towards larger, more strategic AI transformation programs.

feed.title: Walmart Inc. (NASDAQ:WMT) Q4 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Walmart Inc. reported strong Q4 2026 earnings, with revenue up 4.9% in constant currency and adjusted operating income growing 10.5%. The company highlighted significant growth in eCommerce (24%) and advertising (37%), alongside efficient inventory management and strategic investments in AI and automation. Executives emphasized the success of their omnichannel strategy, including faster delivery services and the positive impact of their AI-powered assistant, Sparky, on customer engagement and average order value.

feed.title: Akamai Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ:AKAM) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Akamai Technologies, Inc. reported strong Q4 2025 results with revenue up 7% year-over-year and non-GAAP EPS up 11%. The company highlighted significant growth in its Cloud Infrastructure Services (CIS), particularly driven by the new Akamai Inference Cloud and a large $200 million commitment from a major U.S. tech company for AI infrastructure. Akamai also provided guidance for Q1 and the full year 2026, projecting continued CIS acceleration and strategic investments in AI infrastructure, while addressing increased CapEx due to hardware costs.

feed.title: Edwards Lifesciences Stock at $78: Here’s the Analysts’ Bull Case Scenario
feed.summary: Edwards Lifesciences (EW) shares recently rose 4% to $78.92 after a stronger-than-expected Q4 earnings report, with revenue of $1.57 billion driven by strong TAVR and TMTT sales. The company's future looks promising with raised EPS guidance, new product launches, and a shifting market perception from a single-product company to a multi-therapy structural heart platform. Analysts have a mean price target of $96.50, implying a 22% upside, and a DCF model suggests a 70.4% total return by 2030, indicating the stock is potentially undervalued.

feed.title: Is Salesforce Stock Worth Owning Ahead of Q4 Earnings Release?
feed.summary: Salesforce (CRM) is set to release its Q4 fiscal 2026 earnings on Feb. 25, with analysts expecting strong revenue growth and increased non-GAAP earnings per share, largely driven by its focus on digital transformation, cloud solutions, and strategic AI integrations. Despite recent stock underperformance compared to peers, CRM is trading at a discount in terms of forward 12-month P/E, suggesting it might be a solid investment due to its market leadership and AI expansion initiatives. The company's cost restructuring and acquisitions are also expected to contribute positively to its profitability and revenue diversification.

feed.title: JPMorgan Adjusts Price Target on Ulta Beauty to $800 From $647
feed.summary: JPMorgan has raised its price target for Ulta Beauty (ULTA) to $800 from $647, reflecting a more optimistic outlook on the company's future performance. This adjustment signals a significant upgrade in the bank's valuation of the specialty retailer. The article also provides a company profile for Ulta Beauty, highlighting its operations in cosmetics and perfumes distribution, beauty salons, and online sales.

feed.title: Barclays Adjusts Phillips 66 Price Target to $158 From $142, Maintains Equal Weight Rating
feed.summary: Barclays has increased its price target for Phillips 66 (PSX) to $158 from $142, while reiterating an Equal Weight rating on the stock. The adjustment reflects Barclays' updated valuation for the oil and gas refining and marketing company. Phillips 66's stock was trading at $155.41 at the market close on February 19th.

feed.title: Newmont Corporation (NYSE:NEM) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Newmont Corporation reported strong Q4 2025 earnings, surpassing expectations with an EPS of $2.52 against an anticipated $2.05. The company achieved its full-year guidance for 2025, improved operational performance, and strengthened its financial position, announcing an enhanced capital allocation framework focused on growing dividends and share repurchases. Despite a production trough expected in 2026 due to mine sequencing, Newmont projects a return to growth in 2027 and beyond, maintaining a long-term outlook of approximately 6 million ounces of gold and 150,000 tonnes of copper annually.

feed.title: Evergy, Inc. (NASDAQ:EVRG) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Evergy, Inc. (NASDAQ: EVRG) announced its Q4 2025 earnings, reporting $0.42 EPS against expectations of $0.57. Despite missing earnings, the company raised its long-term adjusted EPS growth target to 6-8% through 2030, driven by new electric service agreements for four major data center projects representing 1.9 gigawatts of steady-state peak demand. Evergy outlined a $21.6 billion capital investment plan for 2026-2030, projecting an 11.5% annualized rate base growth and emphasizing customer affordability and grid modernization.

feed.title: Gold Fields Limited (NYSE:GFI) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Gold Fields Limited reported strong Q4 2025 results, achieving an 18% increase in attributable production to 2.44 million ounces, driven by the Salares Norte mine's ramp-up. The company announced significantly increased shareholder returns, including a special dividend and a $100 million share buyback, and is progressing with strategic projects like Windfall and optimizing its portfolio. Despite facing cost inflation and navigating the Ghanaian royalty situation, Gold Fields is focused on improving safety, predictable delivery, and portfolio quality through brownfields and greenfields exploration.

feed.title: Citigroup Adjusts Expedia Group PT to $225 From $281, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: Citigroup has adjusted its price target for Expedia Group (EXPE) to $225, down from $281, while reiterating a Buy rating on the stock. This update reflects a revised valuation perspective from the firm. Other analysts have also recently adjusted their price targets for Expedia, with diverse ratings ranging from Buy to Neutral and Hold.

feed.title: ICICI Prudential Asset Management Co Ltd Buys 6,000 Shares of Thermo Fisher Scientific Inc. $TMO
feed.summary: ICICI Prudential Asset Management Co Ltd increased its stake in Thermo Fisher Scientific Inc. (NYSE:TMO) by 51.2% in the third quarter, purchasing an additional 6,000 shares to bring its total holding to 17,720 shares valued at $8.595 million. This makes Thermo Fisher Scientific the fund's 28th largest holding, representing 0.9% of its portfolio. The company recently reported better-than-expected earnings and authorized a $5.0 billion share buyback program.

feed.title: ICICI Prudential Asset Management Co Ltd Has $8.10 Million Stock Holdings in The Clorox Company $CLX
feed.summary: ICICI Prudential Asset Management Co Ltd significantly increased its stake in The Clorox Company by 92.7% in Q3, now holding 65,700 shares valued at $8.10 million. Despite this accumulation, analyst sentiment for Clorox remains cautious, with an average rating of "Reduce" and an average target price of $118.73, citing recent target cuts and negative sentiment from several firms. Other institutional investors like Vanguard Group Inc. and Invesco Ltd. also increased their holdings in Clorox.

feed.title: ICICI Prudential Asset Management Co Ltd Purchases 8,529 Shares of Amgen Inc. $AMGN
feed.summary: ICICI Prudential Asset Management Co Ltd increased its stake in Amgen Inc. by 35.9% in the third quarter, purchasing an additional 8,529 shares and bringing its total holdings to 32,267 shares valued at $9.11 million. Amgen recently reported strong Q3 earnings, beating analyst expectations with $5.29 EPS and $9.87 billion in revenue, also raising its quarterly dividend to $2.52 per share and providing a positive FY2026 EPS guidance. Analyst sentiment remains largely positive, with a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating and an average price target of $345.16.

feed.title: Kinross Gold Corporation (NYSE:KGC) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Kinross Gold reported strong Q4 and full-year 2025 results, reaffirming its stable multiyear production profile of 2 million ounces through 2028. The company achieved record free cash flow, strengthened its balance sheet with $1 billion net cash, and is increasing capital returns to shareholders, targeting 40% of free cash flow in 2026 primarily through share repurchases. Kinross is also advancing several high-quality projects, including three U.S. projects expected to come online in 2028, and is making progress on the Great Bear and Lobo Marte development projects.

feed.title: TFI International price target raised to $128 from $116 at Goldman Sachs
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs has increased its price target for TFI International (TFII) to $128 from $116, maintaining a Buy rating on the company's shares. This revised target is based on an attractive valuation for 2027 and potential growth from its Less-Than-Truckload (LTL) and specialized truckload operations, with LTL margins expected to reach high 30s by 2027. Despite a soft freight volume and uncertain Q1 2026, the company's Q4 LTL margins surpassed expectations, indicating a strong position for recovery.

feed.title: South African gold giant returns $1.7 billion to investors, adds $253 million special bonus
feed.summary: Gold Fields, a leading South African gold miner, has announced an additional $253 million special dividend for shareholders, contributing to an impressive $1.7 billion in total returns. This robust performance follows a record financial year in 2025, with profits nearly tripling to $3.57 billion, driven by surging gold prices and strong operational results, particularly at its South Deep operations. The company's strategic focus remains on disciplined execution and maximizing shareholder value amidst evolving market and regulatory landscapes.

feed.title: Edison International (NYSE:EIX) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Edison International (NYSE: EIX) reported its Q4 2025 earnings, with core EPS of $1.86 and full-year 2025 core EPS of $6.55, exceeding guidance. The company reaffirmed its 2028 guidance, extended its 5% to 7% EPS growth target to 2030, and announced a capital plan of $38 billion to $41 billion through 2030, with no equity needs projected for the next five years. Discussions covered wildfire risk mitigation, customer affordability, regulatory visibility, and the ongoing Eaton fire investigation, emphasizing the company's commitment to safety, reliability, and long-term shareholder value.

feed.title: American Water Works Company, Inc. (NYSE:AWK) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: American Water Works Company, Inc. (AWK) reported Q4 2025 earnings, with adjusted EPS of $5.64, nearing the upper end of expectations. The company affirmed its 2026 earnings guidance of $6.02 to $6.12 per share, representing 8% annual growth, and detailed its ongoing capital investments, regulatory activities, and the progress of its merger with Essential Utilities. AWK emphasized its focus on providing affordable, reliable service and its consistent strategy for long-term earnings and dividend growth.

feed.title: PPL Corp. Projects EPS for FY26 Between $1.90 and $1.98
feed.summary: PPL Corp. has projected its fiscal year 2026 earnings per share (EPS) to be between $1.90 and $1.98, aligning closely with the market consensus of $1.95. The regulated utility company operates in Pennsylvania, Kentucky, and Rhode Island, holding a significant market position with a $27.35 billion capitalization. Despite a leveraged balance sheet and some declining profitability metrics, the company maintains a Piotroski F-Score of 7 and a beta of 0.54, suggesting lower volatility for risk-averse investors.

feed.title: LINDE PLC : Gets a Buy rating from Berenberg
feed.summary: Berenberg has upgraded Linde PLC to a "Buy" rating, increasing its target price from USD 500 to USD 535. This recommendation was based on a research note published by Sebastian Bray. The news highlights continued positive sentiment from analysts towards Linde PLC.

feed.title: B of A Securities Raises Target for Howmet Aerospace (HWM) to $3
feed.summary: B of A Securities has raised its price target for Howmet Aerospace (HWM) from $250 to $300, while maintaining a "Buy" rating. This 20% increase reflects a positive outlook, aligning with similar target increases from other firms like J.P. Morgan, BTIG, Citigroup, and Goldman Sachs in the past week. Howmet Aerospace provides engineered solutions for the aerospace and transportation industries, and analysts forecast an average target price of $269.71 for the stock.

feed.title: 13,450 Shares in Broadridge Financial Solutions, Inc. $BR Purchased by ICICI Prudential Asset Management Co Ltd
feed.summary: ICICI Prudential Asset Management Co Ltd acquired a new stake of 13,450 shares in Broadridge Financial Solutions Inc. (NYSE:BR) during the third quarter, valued at approximately $3.20 million. This comes as other institutional investors have also adjusted their holdings in the company. Broadridge recently exceeded quarterly earnings estimates and provided optimistic FY2026 guidance, while analysts currently maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating for the stock.

feed.title: ICICI Prudential Asset Management Co Ltd Makes New $2.11 Million Investment in Tyler Technologies, Inc. $TYL
feed.summary: ICICI Prudential Asset Management Co Ltd has made a new $2.11 million investment in Tyler Technologies (NYSE:TYL), acquiring 4,035 shares in the third quarter. This investment comes as Tyler Technologies missed earnings expectations for its latest quarter, reporting $2.64 EPS against an estimated $2.71, though revenue was up 6.3% year-over-year. Analysts currently hold a "Moderate Buy" consensus for TYL with an average price target of $467.54, despite recent price target reductions.

feed.title: Kenvue Inc. $KVUE Shares Bought by ICICI Prudential Asset Management Co Ltd
feed.summary: ICICI Prudential Asset Management Co Ltd significantly increased its stake in Kenvue Inc. by 137.9% in Q3, acquiring an additional 262,000 shares to own a total of 452,060 shares valued at approximately $7.34 million. This move is part of broader institutional investor activity, with other funds also adjusting their positions in Kenvue. The company recently exceeded quarterly earnings and revenue estimates and announced a quarterly dividend, while analysts currently hold a "Hold" consensus rating for the stock.

feed.title: ICICI Prudential Asset Management Co Ltd Buys 26,400 Shares of International Flavors & Fragrances Inc. $IFF
feed.summary: ICICI Prudential Asset Management Co Ltd recently increased its stake in International Flavors & Fragrances Inc. (NYSE:IFF) by 27.4%, purchasing an additional 26,400 shares and bringing its total holdings to 122,886 shares valued at $7,562,000. Analysts currently rate IFF as a "Moderate Buy" with a consensus price target of $91.17.

feed.title: RBC Cuts Price Target on Invitation Homes to $29 From $30, Keeps Sector Perform Rating
feed.summary: RBC has lowered its price target for Invitation Homes (INVH) to $29 from $30, while maintaining a Sector Perform rating on the stock. This adjustment follows several recent announcements from Invitation Homes, including their Q4 2025 earnings call, a forecast for annual FFO below estimates due to higher costs, and their acquisition of ResiBuilt for $89 million to enhance development capabilities.

feed.title: Pool Corp Stock Plunges 14% on Sluggish Pool Builds: Here’s Where the Stock Could Be Headed in 2026
feed.summary: Pool Corporation (POOL) shares dropped 14.48% after reporting weak Q4 earnings due to sluggish new pool construction and housing market weakness. Despite the slowdown, TIKR's valuation model suggests the stock is undervalued, projecting a 39.8% upside to $305.25, largely supported by its stable and recurring maintenance business.

feed.title: What Are Wall Street Analysts' Target Price for Charles River Laboratories Stock?
feed.summary: Charles River Laboratories International, Inc. (CRL) provides drug discovery and development services. Despite underperforming the broader market and the Health Care Select Sector SPDR Fund (XLV) over the past year, CRL recently reported strong Q4 results, beating Wall Street expectations for both EPS and revenue. Analysts have a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating for CRL stock, with a mean price target suggesting a significant premium from current levels.

feed.title: Barclays Adjusts Price Target on CMS Energy to $79 From $74, Maintains Overweight Rating
feed.summary: Barclays has increased its price target for CMS Energy (CMS) from $74 to $79, while maintaining an "Overweight" rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects a positive outlook on the company's financial prospects. The news follows several other analysts' updates on CMS Energy, indicating active review within the utilities sector.

feed.title: Akamai Technologies, Inseego, Ardelyx And Other Big Stocks Moving Lower In Friday's Pre-Market Session
feed.summary: Akamai Technologies, Inseego, Ardelyx, and several other major stocks experienced declines in Friday's pre-market session. Akamai Technologies (AKAM) dipped after reporting Q4 financial results and issuing FY26 and Q1 adjusted EPS guidance below estimates, despite beating analysts' Q4 revenue expectations. Other companies like Grail Inc (GRAL), Inseego Corp (INSG), Vicor Corp (VICR), Candel Therapeutics Inc (CADL), Ardelyx Inc (ARDX), Select Water Solutions Inc (WTTR), and Copart Inc (CPRT) also saw drops due to disappointing financial results or public offering announcements.

feed.title: JPMorgan Upgrades Group 1 Automotive to Overweight From Neutral, Price Target is $370
feed.summary: JPMorgan has upgraded Group 1 Automotive from Neutral to Overweight, setting a new price target of $370. This change in rating suggests a more positive outlook on the company's stock performance. The report also highlights recent company news, including an increase in its quarterly dividend and previous earnings reports.

feed.title: William Blair Initiates Zimmer Biomet Holdings at Market Perform
feed.summary: William Blair has initiated coverage of Zimmer Biomet Holdings (ZBH) with a Market Perform rating. This announcement is amidst several recent analyst adjustments to price targets and ratings for the medical equipment company, following its Q4 2025 earnings call where it beat quarterly estimates on strong implant demand.

feed.title: FDA Approval For AbbVie/AstraZeneca's Combination Treatment Could Set New Standard For Slow Growing Blood Cancer
feed.summary: The FDA has approved a combination treatment from AbbVie and AstraZeneca for chronic lymphocytic leukemia (CLL), which could significantly improve patient outcomes by offering an all-oral, fixed-duration option. The approval is based on positive Phase 3 trial results showing the treatment's superiority over standard chemotherapy in delaying disease progression. Despite the positive news, AbbVie's stock performance lags slightly behind the broader healthcare sector, though analysts maintain a "Buy" rating.

feed.title: Social media and basketball stars to go one-on-one on the Strip
feed.summary: Former Division I basketball players and social media influencers, Haley and Hanna Cavinder, will headline an event called "Court of Legends" at the Bellagio on the Las Vegas Strip during the NCAA Final Four (April 4-6). This event, in partnership with BetMGM, will feature a skills showdown between the twins, with details on fan engagement and potential betting components to be released. Additionally, the article highlights other upcoming Las Vegas events, including "CircaMania" during Wrestlemania week and the potential renovation of the MGM Grand Garden Arena.

feed.title: 15 Analysts Assess Synopsys: What You Need To Know
feed.summary: Over the past three months, 15 analysts have provided ratings for Synopsys (NASDAQ: SNPS), with a current average price target of $556.13. This represents a slight decrease of 0.21% from previous targets, indicating a negative shift in sentiment despite the company's strong market capitalization, revenue growth of 37.83%, and impressive net margin of 19.9%. Analysts' evaluations, including their ratings and price target adjustments, offer insights into Synopsys's financial health and market standing.

feed.title: Wells Fargo Updates 2026 Earnings Release Date Information
feed.summary: Wells Fargo & Company (NYSE: WFC) has updated its expected earnings release dates and conference call information for 2026. Financial results for each quarter will be released at approximately 7:00 a.m. Eastern time, with a live conference call at 10:00 a.m. Eastern time. The third-quarter 2026 earnings release date has been updated to Tuesday, October 13, 2026, while other dates confirm previous announcements.

feed.title: Wells Fargo Updates 2026 Earnings Release Date Information
feed.summary: Wells Fargo & Company has updated its expected earnings release dates for 2026, confirming the first and second-quarter dates and updating the third-quarter date. Financial results will be released at approximately 7:00 a.m. Eastern time on the specified dates, followed by a live conference call at 10:00 a.m. Eastern time. The company also provided a brief overview of its financial services and assets.

feed.title: U.S. Navy arms Super Hornets with StormBreaker all-weather smart weapon
feed.summary: The U.S. Navy has officially approved Raytheon's StormBreaker smart weapon for operational use on the F/A-18-E/F Super Hornet, enhancing its precision strike capabilities in all weather conditions against moving and stationary targets. This approval follows the weapon's integration on the F-15E and ongoing integration on F-35 variants, with the Super Hornet having first carried StormBreaker in 2023. The compact size of the StormBreaker allows a single aircraft to engage more surface targets and reduces aircrew exposure to harm.

feed.title: Here Are Friday’s Top Wall Street Analyst Research Calls: Amgen, ETSY, Eldorado Gold, GE Aerospace, Merck, Southern Company, Walmart, Yeti, and More
feed.summary: This article compiles top Wall Street analyst upgrades, downgrades, and initiations for individual stocks on Friday, February 20, 2026. It also provides a brief overview of the market's performance, including futures, treasury bonds, oil and gas, gold, and cryptocurrency, noting that market futures are trading lower despite some positive individual company news. Key analyst calls include upgrades for ETSY and Yeti, and downgrades for Walmart and Eldorado Gold, among others, with new initiations for Amgen, GE Aerospace, and Merck.

feed.title: King Luther Capital Management Corp Acquires 115,809 Shares of Truist Financial Corporation $TFC
feed.summary: King Luther Capital Management Corp significantly increased its stake in Truist Financial Corporation (NYSE:TFC) by 94.2% in the third quarter, acquiring an additional 115,809 shares. This makes their total holdings 238,788 shares valued at $10.92 million. Concurrently, other hedge funds also adjusted their positions, and Truist Financial has seen insider selling from its CFO and a director, while analysts have issued a mix of "Buy" and "Hold" ratings with an average target price of $56.47.

feed.title: Microsoft, Quanta, Edison International: CNBC’s ‘Final Trades’ - Edison Intl (NYSE:EIX), Microsoft (NASDAQ:MSFT)
feed.summary: CNBC's "Final Trades" featured recommendations for Microsoft, Quanta Services, and Edison International. Malcolm Ethridge picked Microsoft despite a recent downgrade, while Stephanie Link chose Quanta Services due to strong Q4 earnings and positive guidance. Joe Terranova recommended Edison International, which also reported better-than-expected quarterly results.

feed.title: Fiverr International (NYSE:FVRR) Rating Lowered to "Hold" at Citigroup
feed.summary: Citigroup has downgraded Fiverr International (NYSE:FVRR) from "strong-buy" to "hold," causing the stock to plunge 8.5% to near 52-week lows, with a current market cap of $405 million. This downgrade, alongside target price cuts from several other firms, reflects concerns over the company's FY26 outlook and potential AI headwinds, despite beating Q4 EPS estimates. The consensus rating for Fiverr is now "Hold" with an average price target of $19.30.

feed.title: Hemenway Trust Co LLC Has $10.41 Million Position in American Express Company $AXP
feed.summary: Hemenway Trust Co LLC significantly increased its stake in American Express (AXP) by 52.2% in Q3, now owning 31,339 shares valued at $10.41 million. This increase comes amidst recent insider selling by executives Anna Marrs and Denise Pickett, who collectively sold over 50,000 shares worth $17.9 million. Analysts maintain a "Hold" rating for AXP with a consensus target price of $352.73, while the company anticipates strong FY2026 EPS guidance.

feed.title: AxoGen (NASDAQ:AXGN) Stock Rating Upgraded by Wells Fargo & Company
feed.summary: Wells Fargo & Company has upgraded AxoGen (NASDAQ:AXGN) to a "strong-buy" rating, with other analysts also raising price targets, leading to a consensus "Moderate Buy" and an average price target of $36.22. Despite this, insiders have been selling shares, with over $9 million in sales in the last quarter, reducing their ownership to 2.78%. The company trades near its 12-month high with a market cap of $1.61 billion but remains unprofitable with a P/E ratio of -700.20.

feed.title: Medtronic (NYSE:MDT) Upgraded by Mizuho to "Strong-Buy" Rating
feed.summary: Mizuho upgraded Medtronic (NYSE:MDT) to a "strong-buy" rating, contributing to a "Moderate Buy" consensus among analysts with a $111.05 price target. The upgrade follows Medtronic's beat on Q3 earnings expectations and positive FY2026 guidance, driven by strong demand for heart devices. Despite overall positive sentiment from some analysts highlighting growth potential in cardiovascular and robotics, others express mixed views, trimming price targets due to legal and competitive challenges.

feed.title: Nuclear workhorse: Duke Energy turns $600M in tax credits into bill relief
feed.summary: Duke Energy's nuclear fleet achieved a record 96.9% capacity factor in 2025, providing reliable power to over 8 million homes in the Carolinas. This strong performance generated approximately $600 million in federal nuclear production tax credits, which the company states are directly passed on to customers to reduce costs. Duke Energy plans to continue its nuclear strategy by extending operational lifespans, conducting power uprates, and developing advanced reactors to meet growing energy demands.
